---
name: Feature request
about: Request a new capability or expansion of current support boundaries
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What concrete workflow is blocked today?

## Proposed capability

Describe the requested feature.

## Why current behavior is insufficient

Explain the gap in terms of user workflow, accuracy, performance, or compatibility.

## Scope

- [ ] Input/frontend
- [ ] Synthesis
- [ ] Place/route
- [ ] Timing
- [ ] Verification
- [ ] Simulation
- [ ] PDK/library
- [ ] CLI/Python UX
- [ ] Documentation

## Acceptance criteria

Describe how we would know the feature is complete.

## External references

List benchmarks, papers, competitor behavior, or customer examples if relevant.
